title: GSR 704 (E) Calcutta Metro Rail General ( Amendment) Rules, 2011

In the Calcutta Metro Railway General Rules, 2000, in rule 7.19, in sub-rule (1), for the words "one minute by day and two minutes by night", the words "one minute by day as well as by night and two minutes when visibility is impaired due to thick foggy or dusty or any other type of bad weather" shall be substituted, ' : • " • " : - . : [No.2007/Safety(A&R)/19/5j' VINAY MITTAL, Chairman, Railway Board as Member Traffic, and ex-offjcio Secy. Note: The principal rules: were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part; II, .Section 3, subjection (i), vide number G.S.R, 682(E), dated the 28th August, 2000 and subsequently amended vide number :— (1) GS.R. 979(E), dated the 15th December, 2010.
